title: EMERGENCY GAS VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: FISH OF ROSEBURG EMERGENCY GAS VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency gas vouchers and local bus tickets as funding is allowed and assistance is not guaranteed. Program is only accessible once. Vouchers must be used the same day that they are issued. 405 Jerry's Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older with a demonstrated emergency need Hours: Voicemail available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Calls will be returned the next business day. Email (541) 672-5242 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-5242 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday 1:30pm-3:30pm, Thursday/Friday 9:30am-11:30am. Closed federal holidays, the day after Thanksgiving, and Christmas Eve. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off N Stephens Street Services: Gas Money Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - ROSEBURG FOOD PROJECT FOOD - FISH FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY HOTEL ONE NIGHT STAY VOUCHER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FISH OF ROSEBURG
